results.name: cave of two lovers
results.description: I forgot the first part of this tag's description, but then it goes: SECRET TUNNEL! SECRET TUNNEL! THROUGH THE MOUNTAINS! Secret, secret, secret, secret tunnel!

results.name: characteristic-defining ability
results.description: Cards that have an ability that define something about it that would normally be found somewhere else on the card. Speicifcally, CDAs set color, types, subtypes, power, and/or toughness.
